message:
refactor(tools): gate 24 optional tool modules behind `extended-surfaces` Cargo feature

Add `#[cfg(feature = "extended-surfaces")]` guards to optional tool sub-modules
in tools/mod.rs, continuing the feature-gating strategy established in lib.rs.
This keeps the default compilation surface lean while still allowing full builds
via `--features extended-surfaces`.

Gated modules: adversarial_resilience_metrics, benchmark_methodology,
compatibility_correctness_metrics, containment_revocation_metrics,
enterprise_governance, external_replication_claims, frontier_demo_gate,
migration_incident_datasets, migration_speed_failure_metrics,
migration_validation_cohorts, partner_lighthouse_programs,
performance_hardening_metrics, profile_tuning_harness, redteam_evaluations,
replay_determinism_metrics, report_output_contract, repro_bundle_export,
reputation_graph_apis, safe_extension_onboarding, security_ops_case_studies,
transparent_reports, trust_economics_dashboard, verifier_benchmark_releases,
verifier_toolkit, version_benchmark_standards.

Core modules (benchmark_suite, counterfactual_replay, evidence_replay_validator,
replay_bundle, security_trust_metrics, vef_perf_budget_gate) remain ungated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
